subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God, Who hath revealed Himself unto all things through His Name that is sanctified above all words and names [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی تجلی علی الاشیاء باسمه الذی کان مقدسا عن الالفاظ و الاسماء و
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @preservation; transcription of the Sacred Writings, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
